'''lazuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacist|vacist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacist|vacist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzivith|læzivith]] || [[word:læzivij|læzivij]] || [[word:læzivish|læzivish]] || [[word:læzivi|læzivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazuzuvuth|lazuzuvuth]] || [[word:lazuzuvuj|lazuzuvuj]] || [[word:lazuzuvush|lazuzuvush]] || [[word:lazuzuvu|lazuzuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazuvuth|lazuvuth]] || [[word:lazuvuj|lazuvuj]] || [[word:lazuvush|lazuvush]] || [[word:lazuvu|lazuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazufvuth|lazufvuth]] || [[word:lazufvuj|lazufvuj]] || [[word:lazufvush|lazufvush]] || [[word:lazufvuf|lazufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazuvuthu|lazuvuthu]] || [[word:lazuvuju|lazuvuju]] || [[word:lazuvushu|lazuvushu]] || [[word:lazuvuku|lazuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazuvuth|lazuvuth]] || [[word:lazuvuj|lazuvuj]] || [[word:lazuvush|lazuvush]] || [[word:lazuvu|lazuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazuvuthul|lazuvuthul]] || [[word:lazuvujul|lazuvujul]] || [[word:lazuvushul|lazuvushul]] || [[word:lazuvukul|lazuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazuvuthuthu|lazuvuthuthu]] || [[word:lazuvujuju|lazuvujuju]] || [[word:lazuvushushu|lazuvushushu]] || [[word:lazuvuku|lazuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazuvuthun|lazuvuthun]] || [[word:lazuvujun|lazuvujun]] || [[word:lazuvushun|lazuvushun]] || [[word:lazuvukun|lazuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazuvuthuoro|lazuvuthuoro]] || [[word:lazuvujuoro|lazuvujuoro]] || [[word:lazuvushuoro|lazuvushuoro]] || [[word:lazuvukuoro|lazuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
